summary: Iteration 15: Tested hierarchical ledger system features. All 9 backend tests passed. UI tests confirmed: Parent ledgers show 'View All' button and sub-ledger count badge, sub-ledgers show 'Ledger' button with parent reference, Cash Book party dropdown correctly excludes parent ledgers (uses /api/parties/leaf), auto-creation of sub-ledgers for Staff/Chit Fund/Byaj works correctly.

parent_ledger_display.view_all_button: WORKING - Parent ledgers (KR Apartment, Staff Advances) show 'View All' button
parent_ledger_display.sub_ledger_badge: WORKING - Shows count like '1 Sub-ledgers', '2 Sub-ledgers'
parent_ledger_display.blue_background: WORKING - Parent rows have blue background indicator

sub_ledger_display.parent_reference: WORKING - Shows parent name in PARENT column (e.g., 'KR Apartment', 'Staff Advances')

parent_ledger_modal.sub_ledger_list: WORKING - Shows 'Includes X Sub-ledgers:' with names

cash_book_party_dropdown.excludes_parents: WORKING - KR Apartment (parent) NOT in dropdown

auto_create_sub_ledgers.staff_advances: WORKING - Creating staff auto-creates 'Staff - {name}' under 'Staff Advances' parent
auto_create_sub_ledgers.chit_fund_investment: WORKING - Creating chit fund auto-creates 'Chit - {name}' under 'Chit Fund Investment' parent
auto_create_sub_ledgers.byaj_receivable: WORKING - Creating interest account auto-creates 'Byaj - {party_name}' under 'Byaj (Interest) Receivable' parent

critical_code_review_comments: Hierarchical ledger system is well-implemented with proper parent-child relationships
Auto-creation of parent ledgers (Staff Advances, Chit Fund Investment, Byaj Receivable) under 'current_asset' account head is correct
The /api/parties/leaf endpoint correctly filters out parent ledgers for transaction dropdowns
seed_data_creation: Test data created and cleaned up: TEST_Staff_*, TEST_Chit_*, TEST_Byaj_Party_*
context_for_next_testing_agent: Hierarchical ledger system fully working. Parent ledgers aggregate sub-ledger transactions. /api/parties/leaf excludes parents from transaction dropdowns. Auto-create sub-ledgers for Staff (under Staff Advances), Chit Fund (under Chit Fund Investment), and Interest/Byaj accounts (under Byaj Receivable). All parent ledgers are created under 'current_asset' account head.
